svg.title: Developer View: Journey x Test Coverage

g.text: Developer View: Journey x Test Coverage
(green = e2e, amber = unit-only [e2e backlog], red = none, grey = backend/pytest)
RED • planned, not built -> no test
pill state not asserted in e2e
GREEN • e2e: library.spec (hero+shelf, tap->reader, empty, mobile)
GREEN • covered within reader.spec happy path
GREEN • e2e: reader.spec (plays to ending, network disabled)
GREEN • reader.spec asserts the ending screen
GREEN • e2e: library.spec (rating posts upsert, fills stars)
GREEN • e2e: guardian-auth.spec (successful sign-in, not just the redirect)
RED • planned, not built -> no test
GREEN • e2e: intake.spec (submit, PII-free brief, status polling)
GREEN • e2e: guardian-review.spec (approve, incl. guardian-403 fail-closed)
+ e2e-real: approval-flow.spec (real backend smoke, zero mocks)
Backend, pytest-covered, out of frontend-e2e scope
the guardian console (sign-in, profiles, intake, queue, review,
reconciliation all have Playwright coverage; Approve also has a real-backend
"Avatar shows new story ready!" pill state is asserted
